options.systemMessage:
You are an expert at replicating web page structures while applying different branding. Your specialty is:

1. ANALYZING competitor page structures in detail
2. REPLICATING the exact layout, section flow, and content organization
3. APPLYING new brand colors, fonts, and spacing to that structure
4. Creating pixel-perfect structural matches with different visual styling

When given a competitor page analysis and brand guidelines:
- Prioritize structural accuracy over creative interpretation
- Use competitor's heading texts and section counts exactly
- Match their layout patterns (grid columns, section order, component types)
- Only change: colors → brand colors, fonts → brand fonts, spacing → brand spacing
- Think of it as a 'find and replace' operation on styling, not structure

OUTPUT RULES:
- Return ONLY complete HTML code
- No explanations, no markdown blocks
- Start with <!DOCTYPE html>
- Embed all CSS in <style> tags
-Ensure mobile responsiveness

parameters.jsCode:
// Get the formatted data
const data = $input.first().json;

const competitor = data.competitor;
const brand = data.brand;
const user = data.user;

// Build sections list dynamically
const sections = [];
if (competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasNavigation) {
  sections.push('Navigation Bar - Sticky header with logo and menu');
}
sections.push('Hero Section - Eye-catching headline with CTA buttons');
if (competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasFeatures) {
  sections.push('Features Section - 3-4 feature cards in grid layout');
}
if (competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasPricing) {
  sections.push('Pricing Section - 3 pricing tiers with feature comparison');
}
if (competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasTestimonial) {
  sections.push('Testimonials Section - 2-3 customer reviews with photos');
}
sections.push('Call-to-Action Section - Final conversion section');
if (competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasFooter) {
  sections.push('Footer - Multi-column footer with links and social icons');
}

// Create the comprehensive AI prompt
const prompt = `You are an expert web designer and front-end developer specializing in modern B2B landing pages. Create a stunning, production-ready landing page.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
📊 COMPETITOR PAGE ANALYSIS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Source URL: ${competitor.url}

PAGE STRUCTURE DETECTED:
- Total Sections: ${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.total}
- Page Complexity: ${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.complexity.divCount} div elements
- Page Size: ${Math.round(competitor.analysis.pageStructure.complexity.pageLength / 1024)}KB

MAIN HEADINGS FOUND:
${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.headings.h3List.slice(0, 8).map((h, i) => `  ${i + 1}. ${h}`).join('\n')}

COMPONENTS PRESENT:
${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasNavigation ? '✅' : '❌'} Navigation Bar
${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasHero ? '✅' : '❌'} Hero Section
${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasFeatures ? '✅' : '❌'} Features Section
${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasPricing ? '✅' : '❌'} Pricing Section
${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasTestimonial ? '✅' : '❌'} Testimonials Section
${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasFooter ? '✅' : '❌'} Footer Section

BUTTONS/CTAs FOUND:
${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.buttons.length > 0 
  ? competitor.analysis.pageStructure.buttons.map((btn, i) => `  ${i + 1}. "${btn}"`).join('\n')
  : '  (Use default CTAs)'}



═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
🎯 YOUR MISSION
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Create a SINGLE, COMPLETE HTML file that represents a professional B2B landing page.

CORE REQUIREMENTS:
1. ✅ Mirror the competitor's layout structure and section flow
2. ✅ Apply 100% of OUR brand identity (colors, fonts, spacing - NOT the competitor's)
3. ✅ Modern, clean B2B aesthetic with excellent UX
4. ✅ Make ALL text editable (contenteditable="true")
5. ✅ Fully responsive (mobile-first design)
6. ✅ Production-ready code (clean, semantic, accessible)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
📋 PAGE STRUCTURE TO CREATE
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

${sections.map((section, i) => `${i + 1}. ${section}`).join('\n')}

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
🔧 TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

HTML STRUCTURE:
✅ Single HTML file with ALL CSS embedded in <style> tags
✅ Must include: <!DOCTYPE html>, <html>, <head>, <body>
✅ Semantic HTML5: <header>, <nav>, <main>, <section>, <article>, <footer>
✅ contenteditable="true" on ALL text elements
✅ Proper meta tags: charset, viewport, description

CSS ARCHITECTURE:
✅ Use CSS Custom Properties (CSS Variables) for ALL brand values
✅ Define all colors, fonts, spacing as :root variables
✅ CSS Grid for main page layouts
✅ Flexbox for component-level layouts
✅ Mobile-first approach with min-width media queries
✅ Breakpoint: 768px for tablet/desktop


RESPONSIVE DESIGN:
✅ Mobile: Stack all sections vertically, single column
✅ Tablet (768px+): 2-column layouts where appropriate
✅ Desktop (1024px+): Full multi-column layouts
✅ Max content width: 1200px, centered with auto margins
✅ Padding: Use --space-2xl on mobile, --space-3xl on desktop

INTERACTIONS & ANIMATIONS:
✅ Button hover: transform: translateY(-2px), add shadow
✅ Card hover: transform: translateY(-4px), increase shadow
✅ Smooth transitions: var(--transition)
✅ Link hover: color change to primary color
✅ Navigation: Sticky positioning (position: sticky; top: 0)

ACCESSIBILITY:
✅ Proper heading hierarchy (h1 → h2 → h3)
✅ Alt text for all images
✅ ARIA labels where needed
✅ Color contrast ratio: minimum 4.5:1 for text
✅ Focus states on interactive elements

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
📝 DETAILED SECTION SPECIFICATIONS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasNavigation ? `
1️⃣ NAVIGATION BAR
- Position: sticky, top: 0, z-index: 1000
- Background: var(--color-primary) with slight transparency
- Layout: Flexbox - logo left, nav center, CTA button right
- Mobile: Hamburger menu icon (responsive)
- Padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg)
` : ''}

2️⃣ HERO SECTION
- Full viewport height OR min-height: 600px
- Background: gradient (${brand.colors.gradient}) OR solid primary
- Layout: 2 columns (text left, visual right) on desktop
- Headline (H1): ${brand.typography.heading.sizes.h1} - Use inspiration from: "${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.headings.h3List[0] || 'Transform Your Business with Automation'}"
- Subheadline (P): 2-3 sentences explaining value proposition
- CTA Buttons: Primary ("${brand.content.messaging.ctas[0]}") and Secondary ("${brand.content.messaging.ctas[1]}")
- Optional: Hero image placeholder or decorative SVG element
- Padding: var(--space-3xl) 0
- Text color: White on gradient background

${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasFeatures ? `
3️⃣ FEATURES SECTION
- Headline (H2): "Why Choose ${brand.company.name}"
- Subheadline: Short description
- Layout: CSS Grid - 3 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile
- Feature Cards (3-4 cards):
  - Icon: Use emoji or simple SVG (64px × 64px)
  - Title (H3): Use these headings: ${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.headings.h3List.slice(0, 4).join(', ')}
  - Description: 2-3 sentences per feature
  - Style: White background, var(--radius-md), var(--shadow-light)
  - Padding: var(--space-2xl)
  - Hover: Lift effect with var(--shadow-medium)
- Gap between cards: var(--space-lg)
- Section padding: var(--space-3xl) 0
` : ''}

${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasPricing ? `
4️⃣ PRICING SECTION
- Headline (H2): "Simple, Transparent Pricing"
- Layout: 3 pricing tiers (Starter, Professional, Enterprise)
- Tier cards:
  - Plan name (H3)
  - Price (Large text): $XX/month
  - Feature list (8-10 items with checkmarks)
  - CTA button: "${brand.content.messaging.ctas[0]}"
- Center tier: Highlighted with var(--color-accent), "Most Popular" badge
- Card style: var(--radius-md), var(--shadow-medium)
- Grid: 3 columns desktop, 1 column mobile
` : ''}

${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasTestimonial ? `
5️⃣ TESTIMONIALS SECTION
- Headline (H2): "What Our Clients Say"
- Layout: 2-3 testimonial cards in grid
- Card content:
  - 5-star rating (★★★★★)
  - Quote text (2-3 sentences)
  - Author photo placeholder (circular, 60px)
  - Author name (Bold)
  - Author role/company (Secondary text)
- Background: var(--color-surface)
- Card style: White background, var(--radius-md), var(--shadow-light)
` : ''}

6️⃣ CALL-TO-ACTION SECTION
- Full-width section
- Background: var(--color-primary) OR gradient
- Text color: White
- Headline (H2): "Ready to ${brand.content.messaging.headlines[0]}?"
- Paragraph: Compelling final pitch (2-3 sentences)
- Large CTA button: "${brand.content.messaging.ctas[0]}"
- Centered layout
- Padding: var(--space-4xl) var(--space-lg)

${competitor.analysis.pageStructure.sections.hasFooter ? `
7️⃣ FOOTER
- Background: var(--color-text) (dark)
- Text color: var(--color-surface) (light)
- Layout: 4 columns on desktop, stack on mobile
- Columns:
  1. Company: Logo, tagline, description
  2. Product: Links (Features, Pricing, Use Cases)
  3. Resources: Links (Blog, Documentation, Support)
  4. Contact: Email, Phone, Social icons
- Social icons: Placeholder links for LinkedIn, Twitter, Facebook
- Bottom bar: Copyright text, Privacy Policy, Terms
- Padding: var(--space-3xl) var(--space-lg)
` : ''}

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
🎨 CONTENT & COPY GUIDELINES
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

- Headlines: Benefit-driven, use power words (Automate, Scale, Transform)
- Keep sentences short and scannable
- Use bullet points for feature lists
- Maintain ${brand.content.voice.tone} tone
- CTAs should be action-oriented and clear
- Add placeholder content where competitor data is sparse
- Use real-looking dummy data (names, companies, quotes)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
⚠️ CRITICAL OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

🚨 EXTREMELY IMPORTANT:
1. Return ONLY the complete HTML code
2. NO explanations before or after
3. NO markdown code blocks (no \`\`\`html or \`\`\`)
4. NO comments outside the HTML
5. Just pure, clean HTML starting with <!DOCTYPE html>
6. The output must be ready to save as index.html immediately
7. ALL CSS must be embedded in <style> tags in <head>
8. Must be a complete, valid, working HTML5 document

The HTML should be production-ready and work perfectly when saved and opened in any browser.

Generate the complete HTML now:`;

// Return the prompt and metadata
return {
  json: {
    prompt: prompt,
    metadata: {
      competitorUrl: competitor.url,
      userEmail: user.email,
      sectionsToCreate: sections.length,
      promptLength: prompt.length,
      generatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }
  }
};

nodes.name: Combine Competitors Analysis and Brand Guidelines

parameters.text:
Analyze the attached landing page screenshot. Based only on the visual information in the image, provide a detailed breakdown of the page's structure.

I need you to:


Identify Page Structure: List all major sections in the order they appear (e.g., 'Header', 'Hero', 'Features', 'Testimonials', 'Footer').


Analyze Key Sections: For the 'Hero', 'Feature Sections', and 'Footer', describe their layout and components.


Hero Section: What elements does it contain? (e.g., 'Main headline', 'Subheading', 'Call-to-Action button', 'Background image').


Feature Sections: How are the features laid out? (e.g., 'A 3-column grid, each with an icon, heading, and description').


Footer: What is the structure? (e.g., '4-column layout with links and a logo').


Analyze Layout and Spacing: Briefly describe the overall grid system (e.g., 'Appears to be a 12-column grid') and the use of spacing (e.g., 'Generous white space between sections').


Identify Image Placements: List the purposes of the main images you see (e.g., 'Main hero background image', 'Icons for feature blocks', 'Customer avatar photos').

Please return this analysis in a structured JSON format. The JSON object should have top-level keys: pageStructure, sectionDetails, layoutAnalysis, and imageAnalysis

=Competitors Landing Page Analysis :

{{ $json.content.parts[0].text }}

Brand Guidelines : 


{
  "brandName": "Momentum",
  "brandPersonality": {
    "mission": "To help small businesses build unstoppable marketing momentum.",
}


🚨 EXTREMELY IMPORTANT:
1. Return ONLY the complete HTML code
2. NO explanations before or after
3. NO markdown code blocks (no \`\`\`html or \`\`\`)
4. NO comments outside the HTML
5. Just pure, clean HTML starting with <!DOCTYPE html>
6. The output must be ready to save as index.html immediately
7. ALL CSS must be embedded in <style> tags in <head>
8. Must be a complete, valid, working HTML5 document

The HTML should be production-ready and work perfectly when saved and opened in any browser.

Generate the complete HTML now:


Strictly use brandguidelines and Competitors landing page analysis to generate landing page 


Note : Don't add any newline characters and comments in html code

parameters.text:
Analyze this landing page:

1. Sections: List all sections in order (nav, hero, features, etc.)
2. Layout: Grid patterns, column counts
3. Headings: All visible H1, H2, H3 texts
4. Colors: Primary, secondary, accent colors (hex)
5. Components: Count of cards, buttons, testimonials
6. Style: Modern/corporate/minimal, spacing (tight/normal/loose)
7. CTAs: All button texts

Be specific. Use exact text and counts.

parameters.formDescription: Submit competitors page url and brand guidelines

parameters.text:
Analyze this landing page:

1. Sections: List all sections in order (nav, hero, features, etc.)
2. Layout: Grid patterns, column counts
3. Headings: All visible H1, H2, H3 texts
4. Colors: Primary, secondary, accent colors (hex)
5. Components: Count of cards, buttons, testimonials
6. Style: Modern/corporate/minimal, spacing (tight/normal/loose)
7. CTAs: All button texts

Be specific. Use exact text and counts.

=You are a professional web developer. Generate a complete, production-ready HTML landing page based on this analysis and assets

Return proper usable html code.

Analysis : 
{{ $json.data[0].structureText }}

Landing Page Image Analysis : 
{{ $json.data[2].landing_page_analysis }}

Brand Guidelines
{{ $json.data[1].brand_guidelines }}

REQUIREMENTS:
1. Use the EXACT structure from the analysis (same sections, same order)
2. Incorporate all user assets (brand name, tagline, features, etc.)
3. Use the user's color scheme (primary: ${assets.primaryColor}, secondary: ${assets.secondaryColor})
5. Make it fully responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
6. Include the logo, hero image, and feature images with proper data URIs
7. Use semantic HTML5 elements
8. Add smooth animations and transitions
9. Include meta tags for SEO
10. Make all CTAs clickable (use mailto: for email

Generate ONLY the complete HTML code, nothing else. Include all CSS inline using <style> tags. Make it beautiful and professional.

Most Important Note : Remove all escape sequences, backslash(\), newline characters and comments from the code and return proper html ready to use code.

                return function (callback) {
                    /**
                    * Third parties might dispatch DOMContentLoaded events, so we need to ensure that we only run our callback once!

                    if (executedCallbacks.has(callback)) return;

                        wrappedCallback();
                    } else {

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-6ef0b43 elementor-widget elementor-widget-pxl_accordion" data-id="6ef0b43" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="pxl_accordion.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					    <div class="pxl-accordion pxl-accordion1 style-default wow animate-on-scroll" data-wow-delay="ms" style="translate: none; rotate: none; scale: none; transform: translate(0px, 200px); opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; animation-name: none;">
                    <div class="pxl--item active">
                                     <div class="pxl-item--image bg-image" style="background-image: url(https://hubcredo.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/img-faq1-228x112.webp);">
                    </div>
                                    <h5 class="pxl-accordion--title" data-target="#pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-6c3c59f">
                        <div class="pxl-title--number pxl-empty"></div>
                            <span class="pxl-title--text">What services does Hubcredo provide?</span>
                            <span class="pxl-icon--action"><span class="pxl-icon--plus"><span></span></span></span>
                    </h5>
                    <div id="pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-6c3c59f" class="pxl-accordion--content" style="display: block;">We specialize in AI-powered automation, lead generation, CRM management, cold email campaigns, data enrichment, and building end-to-end workflows using tools like Clay and n8n.</div>
            </div>
                    <div class="pxl--item ">
                                     <div class="pxl-item--image bg-image" style="background-image: url(https://hubcredo.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/img-contact-team-dt-228x112.webp);">
                    </div>
                                    <h5 class="pxl-accordion--title" data-target="#pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-f7f4c08">
                        <div class="pxl-title--number pxl-empty"></div>
                            <span class="pxl-title--text">How can automation improve my business?</span>
                            <span class="pxl-icon--action"><span class="pxl-icon--plus"><span></span></span></span>
                    </h5>
                    <div id="pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-f7f4c08" class="pxl-accordion--content">Automation reduces repetitive tasks, speeds up outreach, maintains accurate data, and ensures your team focuses on closing deals rather than manual work.</div>
            </div>
                    <div class="pxl--item ">
                                     <div class="pxl-item--image bg-image" style="background-image: url(https://hubcredo.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/img-contact-team-dt-228x112.webp);">
                    </div>
                                    <h5 class="pxl-accordion--title" data-target="#pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-421a42e">
                        <div class="pxl-title--number pxl-empty"></div>
                            <span class="pxl-title--text">Which tools do you use for automation?</span>
                            <span class="pxl-icon--action"><span class="pxl-icon--plus"><span></span></span></span>
                    </h5>
                    <div id="pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-421a42e" class="pxl-accordion--content">We work with Clay, n8n, HubSpot, Smartlead.ai, Apollo, and other AI-powered platforms to streamline workflows and marketing processes.</div>
            </div>
                    <div class="pxl--item ">
                                     <div class="pxl-item--image bg-image" style="background-image: url(https://hubcredo.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/img-contact-team-dt-228x112.webp);">
                    </div>
                                    <h5 class="pxl-accordion--title" data-target="#pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-7f6be46">
                        <div class="pxl-title--number pxl-empty"></div>
                            <span class="pxl-title--text">Can Hubcredo handle cold email campaigns?</span>
                            <span class="pxl-icon--action"><span class="pxl-icon--plus"><span></span></span></span>
                    </h5>
                    <div id="pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-7f6be46" class="pxl-accordion--content">Yes. We automate cold emails, follow-ups, and personalization to improve response rates and save time for your sales team.</div>
            </div>
                    <div class="pxl--item ">
                                     <div class="pxl-item--image bg-image" style="background-image: url(https://hubcredo.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/img-contact-team-dt-228x112.webp);">
                    </div>
                                    <h5 class="pxl-accordion--title" data-target="#pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-63081ea">
                        <div class="pxl-title--number pxl-empty"></div>
                            <span class="pxl-title--text">How do you manage CRM systems?</span>
                            <span class="pxl-icon--action"><span class="pxl-icon--plus"><span></span></span></span>
                    </h5>
                    <div id="pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-63081ea" class="pxl-accordion--content">We integrate AI and automation into your CRM to handle data enrichment, pipeline updates, reporting, and workflow triggers—keeping your sales process seamless.</div>
            </div>
                    <div class="pxl--item ">
                                     <div class="pxl-item--image bg-image" style="background-image: url(https://hubcredo.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/img-contact-team-dt-228x112.webp);">
                    </div>
                                    <h5 class="pxl-accordion--title" data-target="#pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-f54404c">
                        <div class="pxl-title--number pxl-empty"></div>
                            <span class="pxl-title--text">Do you provide custom automation workflows?</span>
                            <span class="pxl-icon--action"><span class="pxl-icon--plus"><span></span></span></span>
                    </h5>
                    <div id="pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-f54404c" class="pxl-accordion--content">Absolutely. We design workflows tailored to your business, connecting multiple tools, automating processes, and ensuring measurable results.</div>
            </div>
                    <div class="pxl--item ">
                                     <div class="pxl-item--image bg-image" style="background-image: url(https://hubcredo.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/img-contact-team-dt-228x112.webp);">
                    </div>
                                    <h5 class="pxl-accordion--title" data-target="#pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-93a2fe0">
                        <div class="pxl-title--number pxl-empty"></div>
                            <span class="pxl-title--text">How quickly can I see results?</span>
                            <span class="pxl-icon--action"><span class="pxl-icon--plus"><span></span></span></span>
                    </h5>
                    <div id="pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-93a2fe0" class="pxl-accordion--content">Many clients notice increased efficiency and improved lead engagement within the first few weeks of implementing our AI-driven workflows.</div>
            </div>
                    <div class="pxl--item ">
                                     <div class="pxl-item--image bg-image" style="background-image: url(https://hubcredo.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/img-contact-team-dt-228x112.webp);">
                    </div>
                                    <h5 class="pxl-accordion--title" data-target="#pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-980cc9f">
                        <div class="pxl-title--number pxl-empty"></div>
                            <span class="pxl-title--text">Do you offer ongoing support after setup?</span>
                            <span class="pxl-icon--action"><span class="pxl-icon--plus"><span></span></span></span>
                    </h5>
                    <div id="pxl_accordion-6ef0b43-5524-980cc9f" class="pxl-accordion--content">Yes. We provide ongoing monitoring, optimization, and support to ensure your automation continues to deliver results.</div>
            </div>
            </div>

    			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

parts.text:
This landing page for HubCredo is well-structured and designed, effectively communicating its core value proposition. Here's a detailed analysis of its structure, design, and SEO aspects:

---

### **Overall Impression**

The landing page presents a modern, clean, and professional aesthetic, heavily leaning into a purple and pink gradient color scheme. It clearly positions HubCredo as a solution provider for AI-powered business automation. The flow is logical, guiding the user through problem-solution, benefits, social proof, and trust-building elements, culminating in a clear call to action.

---

### **Structure Analysis**

The page follows a standard, effective landing page structure designed for conversion:

1.  **Hero Section:**
    *   **Logo & Branding:** "HubCredo" logo prominently displayed at the top left, establishing brand identity immediately.
    *   **Main Headline (H1):** "Revolutionize Your Business with AI-Powered Solutions" – Strong, benefit-driven, and clearly states the core offering.
    *   **Sub-headline:** Explains *how* they achieve this: "At HubCredo, we integrate cutting-edge AI to automate your business processes and unlock growth."
    *   **Call to Action (CTA):** "Book A Free Consultation" – Primary conversion goal, highly visible.
    *   **Visuals:** Abstract UI elements depicting workflows and data, reinforcing the AI automation theme without being overly complex.

2.  **"We're Creative" / Value Proposition Section:**
    *   **Headline:** "We're Creative" – A confident, slightly unconventional statement.
    *   **Supporting Text:** Reiterates the value: "At HubCredo, we create AI-powered automation systems that eliminate manual tasks, improve efficiency, and help your business grow faster."
    *   **Image:** A person interacting with technology, adding a human touch and contextualizing the "solutions."

3.  **"Why Should You Choose?" Section:**
    *   **Headline (H2):** "Why Should You Choose?" – Directly addresses user's potential questions about competitive advantage.
    *   **Visual Element:** A prominent purple mandala-like graphic, adding brand consistency and visual interest in a potentially blank space (where detailed benefits would likely follow upon interaction or scroll).

4.  **Client Feedback / Testimonials Section:**
    *   **Headline (H2):** "Client's Feedback" – Builds social proof and trust.
    *   **CTA:** "Testimonials" – Suggests a page or modal with more detailed feedback.
    *   **Navigation:** Left/right arrows indicate a carousel for multiple testimonials.

5.  **Key Benefits/Features Stripe:**
    *   A horizontal bar listing distinct advantages: "Automated Workflows," "Startup friendly," "Smart Data Enrichment," "Faster response time," "Automated Lead Generation," "Cold Email Made Easy," "Optimized..." (truncated). This is highly scannable and impactful.

6.  **"Our Process" Section:**
    *   **Headline (H2):** "Our Process Is Divided Into Four Key Phases" – Provides transparency and sets expectations for how services are delivered. (Implies detailed steps would be presented below).

7.  **Partnership Section:**
    *   **Headline (H2):** "We are a Proud partner of" – Builds credibility and trust by associating with known brands (HubSpot, n8n, etc.).
    *   **Logos:** Visual display of partner companies.

8.  **FAQ Section:**
    *   **Headline (H2):** "FAQ" – Addresses common questions and objections, reducing friction for conversion. (Implies an accordion or Q&A format below).

9.  **Footer:**
    *   **Branding:** HubCredo logo.
    *   **Legal Links:** "Privacy Policy," "Terms & Conditions" – Essential for transparency and legal compliance.
    *   **Copyright Information.**

---

### **Design Analysis**

1.  **Color Palette:**
    *   **Primary Colors:** Dominated by various shades of purple, ranging from deep violet to lavender, combined with soft pink and blue gradients. This creates a modern, sophisticated, and slightly futuristic feel often associated with technology and innovation.
    *   **Contrast:** White text against darker purples ensures excellent readability for headlines and key information.

2.  **Typography:**
    *   **Font Choice:** A clean, modern sans-serif typeface is used throughout, contributing to the tech-savvy and professional image.
    *   **Hierarchy:** Excellent use of font sizes and weights clearly differentiates headlines (H1, H2s) from body text and CTAs, guiding the user's eye.

3.  **Imagery & Graphics:**
    *   **Abstract UI/Workflow Elements:** The background of the hero section features stylized representations of data flows, charts, and application interfaces. This visually communicates the "AI automation" aspect without needing literal product screenshots.
    *   **Branding Graphics:** The purple starburst logo and the mandala-like graphic ("Why Should You Choose?") reinforce brand identity subtly.
    *   **Credibility Building:** Partner logos are clean and well-integrated.

4.  **Layout & Spacing:**
    *   **Whitespace:** Generous use of whitespace around sections and elements gives the page a clean, uncluttered look and improves readability.
    *   **Pacing:** The alternating sections, some with more content and others more visual, create good pacing as the user scrolls, preventing visual fatigue.
    *   **Call to Action:** The "Book A Free Consultation" button is visually prominent with its distinct purple background and arrow icon, ensuring it stands out.

5.  **Responsiveness (Inferred):** While not tested directly, the clean, block-based structure and modern design principles suggest it's likely designed to be fully responsive across various devices.

---

### **SEO Insights**

1.  **Keyword Integration:**
    *   **Headlines:** The H1 ("Revolutionize Your Business with AI-Powered Solutions") and sub-headline effectively use core keywords like "AI-Powered Solutions," "automate business processes," and "unlock growth."
    *   **Body Text:** Phrases like "AI-powered automation systems," "eliminate manual tasks," "improve efficiency," "grow faster" are strategically placed, targeting relevant search queries.
    *   **Benefits Stripe:** This section is a mini-keyword powerhouse, directly listing user benefits and services ("Automated Workflows," "Smart Data Enrichment," "Automated Lead Generation," "Cold Email Made Easy").

2.  **Content Relevance & Depth:**
    *   The page directly addresses the pain points of businesses looking for efficiency and growth through automation.
    *   The structure allows for detailed content in sections like "Why Choose Us," "Our Process," and "FAQ," which are excellent for capturing long-tail keywords and providing valuable information to users and search engines.

3.  **Heading Structure:**
    *   The clear use of a primary H1 and subsequent H2s (e.g., "Why Should You Choose?", "Client's Feedback", "Our Process", "Proud partner", "FAQ") provides a logical content hierarchy that is easily understood by search engine crawlers.

4.  **Call to Action (CTA):**
    *   The clear "Book A Free Consultation" CTA is optimized for conversion, and its placement guides users towards the next step.

5.  **Social Proof & Trust Signals:**
    *   **Testimonials:** The "Client's Feedback" section is valuable for social proof. If structured with schema markup (e.g., `Review` or `AggregateRating` schema), it can enhance search visibility with rich snippets.
    *   **Partnerships:** Listing partners like HubSpot and n8n builds authority and trust. While direct SEO benefit from partner links is often minimal (many are `nofollow`), the brand association is positive.

6.  **FAQ Section:**
    *   This is a strong SEO element. FAQ sections naturally contain question-and-answer pairs that match user queries. Implementing `FAQPage` schema markup can lead to rich snippets in search results, increasing click-through rates.

7.  **Page Speed (Potential):**
    *   The clean design, while visually appealing, doesn't appear overly reliant on heavy animations or excessive media, suggesting the page could load quickly, which is a positive ranking factor.

8.  **Internal & External Links:**
    *   **Footer Links:** "Privacy Policy" and "Terms & Conditions" are important for compliance and user trust.
    *   **CTA Link:** The primary CTA links to the consultation booking page, which is the main conversion path.
    *   (Missing from visible page: A main navigation menu. While often omitted on *landing pages* to maintain focus, for a full website, this would be crucial for internal linking and site architecture.)

---

**In conclusion, HubCredo's landing page is a strong example of effective digital marketing. It combines a visually appealing and brand-consistent design with a logical structure that guides users and incorporates key SEO elements to ensure discoverability and conversion.**

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text {
			border: 0;
			clip-path: inset(50%);
			height: 1px;
			margin: -1px;
			overflow: hidden;
			padding: 0;
			position: absolute !important;
			width: 1px;
			word-wrap: normal !important;
		}

			background-color: #eee;
			clip-path: none;

			height: auto;

			line-height: normal;
			padding: 15px 23px 14px;
			text-decoration: none;

			width: auto;

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript">
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
  const $slider = $('#resource-override-slider-block_2fd980639d90ccaa0dcf225a273db895');

  // Function to update the background color
  function updateBackgroundColor(event) {
      const currentSlide = $slider.find('.owl-item.active .slide'); // Find active slide
      const bgColor = currentSlide.data('bg-color'); // Get the data-bg-color attribute
      $slider.attr('data-bg-color', bgColor);
      $slider.css('background-color', bgColor); // Update container background
  }

  // Initialize background color on load
  $slider.on('initialized.owl.carousel', updateBackgroundColor);

  // Update background color on slide change
  $slider.on('changed.owl.carousel', updateBackgroundColor);

  $slider.owlCarousel({
    center: true,
    items:1,
    loop:true,
    margin:10,
    nav:true,
    stagePadding:0,
    onInitialized: function() {
        // Set the initial background color on load
        updateBackgroundColor();
    },
  });
  // Update background color after the slide transition is complete
 $slider.on('translated.owl.carousel', updateBackgroundColor);
    
    // Wrap nav and dots together
setTimeout(function () {
  var carousel = $('#resource-override-slider-block_2fd980639d90ccaa0dcf225a273db895');
  var nav = carousel.find('.owl-nav');
  var dots = carousel.find('.owl-dots');
  
  $('<div class="owl-nav-and-dots"></div>')
    .append(nav)
    .append(dots)
    .appendTo(carousel);
}, 100);
});
</script>

        <script type="application/ld+json">
        {
            "@context": "https://schema.org",

            <h2 id="at-6912aff88a1501" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-controls="ac-6912aff88a1501" aria-expanded="false">
                What is Lever and how does it support modern recruiting?            </h2>

            <div id="ac-6912aff88a1501" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Lever is a leading recruitment software and applicant tracking system platform that combines applicant tracking, candidate relationship management, and recruitment analytics software in one solution. Lever helps organizations attract, engage, and hire top talent with ease while delivering a streamlined recruiter and candidate experience.</p>
<p></p>
            </div>
        </div>

        
        <div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0">

            <h2 id="at-6912aff88a1502" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-controls="ac-6912aff88a1502" aria-expanded="false">
                How does Lever’s applicant tracking system work?            </h2>

            <div id="ac-6912aff88a1502" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Lever, one of the best applicant tracking systems, is designed to simplify the hiring process. As one of the best applicant tracking systems on the market, Lever’s combined ATS and CRM enables teams to post jobs, manage candidates, and track progress in real time. With Lever , recruiting teams gain efficiency and visibility across the entire hiring lifecycle.</p>
<p></p>
            </div>
        </div>

        
        <div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0">

            <h2 id="at-6912aff88a1503" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-controls="ac-6912aff88a1503" aria-expanded="false">
                Does Lever include AI Companion or recruitment automation tools or automation tools?            </h2>

            <div id="ac-6912aff88a1503" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Yes. Lever software offers AI Companion capabilities that help recruiters work smarter. From automated resume screening to interview scheduling, Lever makes hiring more efficient while ensuring hiring teams can focus on building meaningful candidate relationships.</p>
<p></p>
            </div>
        </div>

        
        <div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0">

            <h2 id="at-6912aff88a1504" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-controls="ac-6912aff88a1504" aria-expanded="false">
                What integrations does Lever support?            </h2>

            <div id="ac-6912aff88a1504" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Lever integrations connect seamlessly with hundreds of HR systems, background check providers, assessment platforms, and more. The Lever platform offers robust integration options so you can connect recruiting workflows with the tools your team already relies on. Lever integrations ensure data flows smoothly across your entire HR tech stack.</p>
<p></p>
            </div>
        </div>

        
        <div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0">

            <h2 id="at-6912aff88a1505" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-controls="ac-6912aff88a1505" aria-expanded="false">
                How does Lever compare to other applicant tracking systems like Greenhouse, Workable, or Ashby?            </h2>

            <div id="ac-6912aff88a1505" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Lever is a powerful Greenhouse alternative and Workable alternative to other ATS platforms. While  alternatives may vary in functionality and pricing, Lever offers competitive value with an all-in-one solution for applicant tracking software, recruitment analytics, and candidate relationship management.  Recruiters choose Lever because it delivers automation, candidate pipeline visibility, and recruitment analytics that competitors can’t match—plus seamless integrations that tie your hiring tech stack together for faster, smarter decisions.</p>
<p></p>
            </div>
        </div>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript" id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.id = 'wp-skip-link';
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerText = 'Skip to content';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
</script>

parts.text:
Here's a detailed analysis of the landing page:

---

### Landing Page Analysis

**1. Sections (in order):**

1.  **Navigation Bar:** (Top bar with logo, menu, contact, and CTAs)
2.  **Hero Section:** (Large banner image with main heading and call to action)
3.  **Why Lever Section:** (Explaining the AI-powered interview tool, text with illustration)
4.  **Recognition & Testimonials:** (Analyst recognition and customer quotes)
5.  **Employ Advantage / AI Companions:** (Section detailing AI companion tools)
6.  **Recruitment Software Features:** (Section showcasing different software types)
7.  **Ready to Power Hiring Momentum:** (Motivational section with a call to action)
8.  **2025 Recruiter Nation Report:** (Content promotion section)
9.  **IDC ROI Calculator:** (Tool promotion section)
10. **Beyond Automation / True AI Revolution:** (Whitepaper promotion section)
11. **Lever Talent Acquisition Software FAQs:** (Frequently asked questions)
12. **Footer:** (Copyright, links, company information)

**2. Layout:**

*   **Navigation Bar:** Horizontal layout with left-aligned logo, center-aligned main menu links, and right-aligned contact info and primary CTAs.
*   **Hero Section:** 2-column layout. Left side features a large image of a smiling person, while the right side contains the main heading, descriptive text, and a CTA button.
*   **Why Lever Section:** Starts as a 1-column heading, followed by a 2-column layout where the left column contains text and a CTA, and the right column features a subtle illustrative graphic.
*   **Recognition & Testimonials:** 1-column title and subtitle, followed by a 2x2 grid (4 total) of testimonial cards.
*   **Employ Advantage / AI Companions:** Starts with a 1-column main heading and descriptive text. Followed by a 3-column grid displaying three "AI Companion" features (AI Interview Companion, AI Screening Companion, AI Sourcing Companion). Below this is a 1-column section for "Unmatched, Always-On Governance."
*   **Recruitment Software Features:** 1-column title. Followed by a 3-column grid displaying three different recruitment software approaches ("Essential, Affordable...", "Flexible Hiring...", "Powerful Talent Acquisition...").
*   **Ready to Power Hiring Momentum:** 1-column layout with a large heading, descriptive text, and a centered CTA button.
*   **2025 Recruiter Nation Report:** 1-column layout with a smaller category heading, main heading, descriptive text, and a CTA button.
*   **IDC ROI Calculator:** 1-column layout with a smaller category heading, main heading, descriptive text, and a CTA button.
*   **Beyond Automation / True AI Revolution:** 1-column layout with a smaller category heading, main heading, descriptive text, and a CTA button.
*   **Lever Talent Acquisition Software FAQs:** 1-column layout with a main heading, followed by an accordion-like list of 5 questions, each in its own row.
*   **Footer:** 4-column grid for navigation links, followed by a 1-column layout for copyright and legal information.

**3. Headings:**

*   **H1:**
    *   "Whatever Comes Next,\nLever Moves With You"
*   **H2:**
    *   "Why Lever?"
    *   "Recognized by the Best in the Biz"
    *   "Praised by the People Who Matter Most"
    *   "Discover the Employ Advantage with\nOur AI Companions by Your Side"
    *   "Real Options. Real Flexibility.\nPays You Hire."
    *   "Ready to Power Your\nHiring Momentum?"
    *   "Lever Talent Acquisition Software FAQs: Your Questions Answered"
*   **H3:**
    *   "Integrated AI-Powered Interview Tool"
    *   "Essential, Affordable\nRecruitment Software"
    *   "Flexible Hiring and\nCandidate Management"
    *   "Powerful Talent Acquisition\nSoftware Tailored to You"
    *   "2025 RECRUITER NATION REPORT"
    *   "IDC ROI CALCULATOR"
    *   "BEYOND AUTOMATION"

**4. Colors:**

*   **Primary Background:** `#ffffff` (White)
*   **Primary Text:** `#1a1a1a` (Very Dark Grey / Near Black)
*   **Secondary Text / Subheadings:** `#4d4d4d` (Dark Grey)
*   **Hero Background Accent:** `#e0f2f1` (Light Teal)
*   **Section Background Accent (Ready to Power):** `#f5fcf9` (Very Light Green/Aqua)
*   **Unmatched Governance Box Background:** `#fffbf0` (Light Yellow)
*   **Footer Background:** `#1a1a1a` (Very Dark Grey / Near Black)

*   **Accent Colors (Buttons):**
    *   Primary CTA (Teal/Green): `#39a695`
    *   Orange CTA: `#f48c66`
    *   Purple CTA: `#b08fe6`
    *   Blue CTA: `#66b0f4`
    *   Black CTA: `#000000`

**5. Components:**

*   **Cards:** 10
    *   4 Testimonial Cards
    *   3 AI Companion Feature Cards
    *   3 Recruitment Software Feature Cards
*   **Buttons:** 15
*   **Testimonials:** 4

**6. Style:**

*   **Overall Style:** Modern, clean, and corporate. Utilizes sans-serif typography throughout for a professional and legible appearance.
*   **Spacing:** Predominantly **loose** to **normal** spacing, particularly for main sections and between content blocks, creating an airy and uncluttered feel. Some areas like the footer links have a slightly tighter spacing.

**7. CTAs (All visible button texts):**

1.  "Request Demo"
2.  "Pricing"
3.  "Get a Demo" (in hero section)
4.  "Learn More About our AI Interview Companion"

json.Brand Guidelines:
BRAND NAME: TalentFlow
COMPANY TAGLINE: Where Talent Meets Opportunity
BRAND VOICE: Professional, innovative, human-centered. Approachable and confident. Focus on making hiring faster and smarter.
PRIMARY COLORS: Deep Navy Blue (#1a3a52), Vibrant Teal (#00b4a0), Warm Orange (#ff6b35)
FONTS: Inter for headings (bold), Open Sans for body text
DESIGN STYLE: Clean, minimalist, modern. Real people in authentic workplace photos. No stock imagery.
KEY FEATURES: AI-powered candidate screening, fast time-to-hire, easy integration, 24/7 support, enterprise security
TARGET AUDIENCE: Growing companies with 50-500 employees looking for an affordable ATS with advanced AI
UNIQUE SELLING POINT: Best-in-class AI screening combined with most affordable pricing for mid-market companies
BRAND PROMISE: Reduce hiring time by 40% while improving candidate quality with intelligent automation
TONE OF COMMUNICATION: Confident but approachable. Solution-focused. Data-driven. Human-first.

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-content-heading-font-size" style="font-style:normal;font-weight:600">Real Options. Real Flexibility. <br>For All the Ways You Hire.</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center intro-txt">Whether you’re a scrappy startup or a Fortune 100 giant, we meet you where you are—and give you the tools to keep growing. Our three unique, AI-powered ATS solutions flex to fit your needs. Because one-size-fits-all just doesn’t cut it.</p>

<script type="rocketlazyloadscript">
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
  const $slider = $('#resource-override-slider-block_2fd980639d90ccaa0dcf225a273db895');

  // Function to update the background color
  function updateBackgroundColor(event) {
      const currentSlide = $slider.find('.owl-item.active .slide'); // Find active slide
      const bgColor = currentSlide.data('bg-color'); // Get the data-bg-color attribute
      $slider.attr('data-bg-color', bgColor);
      $slider.css('background-color', bgColor); // Update container background
  }

  // Initialize background color on load
  $slider.on('initialized.owl.carousel', updateBackgroundColor);

  // Update background color on slide change
  $slider.on('changed.owl.carousel', updateBackgroundColor);

  $slider.owlCarousel({
    center: true,
    items:1,
    loop:true,
    margin:10,
    nav:true,
    stagePadding:0,
    onInitialized: function() {
        // Set the initial background color on load
        updateBackgroundColor();
    },
  });
  // Update background color after the slide transition is complete
 $slider.on('translated.owl.carousel', updateBackgroundColor);
    
    // Wrap nav and dots together
setTimeout(function () {
  var carousel = $('#resource-override-slider-block_2fd980639d90ccaa0dcf225a273db895');
  var nav = carousel.find('.owl-nav');
  var dots = carousel.find('.owl-dots');
  
  $('<div class="owl-nav-and-dots"></div>')
    .append(nav)
    .append(dots)
    .appendTo(carousel);
}, 100);
});
</script>

            <h2 id="at-6912eb1f9fca91" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-controls="ac-6912eb1f9fca91" aria-expanded="false">
                What is Lever and how does it support modern recruiting?            </h2>

            <div id="ac-6912eb1f9fca91" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Lever is a leading recruitment software and applicant tracking system platform that combines applicant tracking, candidate relationship management, and recruitment analytics software in one solution. Lever helps organizations attract, engage, and hire top talent with ease while delivering a streamlined recruiter and candidate experience.</p>
<p></p>
            </div>
        </div>

        
        <div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0">

            <h2 id="at-6912eb1f9fca92" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-controls="ac-6912eb1f9fca92" aria-expanded="false">
                How does Lever’s applicant tracking system work?            </h2>

            <div id="ac-6912eb1f9fca92" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Lever, one of the best applicant tracking systems, is designed to simplify the hiring process. As one of the best applicant tracking systems on the market, Lever’s combined ATS and CRM enables teams to post jobs, manage candidates, and track progress in real time. With Lever , recruiting teams gain efficiency and visibility across the entire hiring lifecycle.</p>
<p></p>
            </div>
        </div>

        
        <div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0">

            <h2 id="at-6912eb1f9fca93" class="c-accordion__title js-accordion-controller" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-controls="ac-6912eb1f9fca93" aria-expanded="false">
                Does Lever include AI Companion or recruitment automation tools or automation tools?            </h2>

            <div id="ac-6912eb1f9fca93" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Yes. Lever software offers AI Companion capabilities that help recruiters work smarter. From automated resume screening to interview scheduling, Lever makes hiring more efficient while ensuring hiring teams can focus on building meaningful candidate relationships.</p>
<p></p>
            </div>
        </div>

        
        <div class="wp-block-pb-accordion-item c-accordion__item js-accordion-item" data-initially-open="false" data-click-to-close="true" data-auto-close="true" data-scroll="false" data-scroll-offset="0">

            <div id="ac-6912eb1f9fca94" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Lever integrations connect seamlessly with hundreds of HR systems, background check providers, assessment platforms, and more. Lever integrations ensure data flows smoothly across your entire HR tech stack.</p>

                How does Lever compare to other applicant tracking systems like Greenhouse, Workable, or Ashby?            </h2>

            <div id="ac-6912eb1f9fca95" class="c-accordion__content" hidden="hidden">
                <p></p><p>Lever is a powerful Greenhouse alternative and Workable alternative to other ATS platforms. While  alternatives may vary in functionality and pricing, Lever offers competitive value with an all-in-one solution for applicant tracking software, recruitment analytics, and candidate relationship management.  Recruiters choose Lever because it delivers automation, candidate pipeline visibility, and recruitment analytics that competitors can’t match—plus seamless integrations that tie your hiring tech stack together for faster, smarter decisions.</p>

	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.id = 'wp-skip-link';
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerText = 'Skip to content';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
</script>
